nasb.text: Jesus was going through all the cities and villages, teaching in their synagogues and proclaiming the gospel of the kingdom, and healing every kind of disease and every kind of sickness.

esv.text: And Jesus went throughout all the cities and villages, teaching in their synagogues and proclaiming the gospel of the kingdom and healing every disease and every affliction.

cnv.text: 耶穌走遍各城各鄉，在各會堂裡教導人，宣揚天國的福音，醫治各種疾病、各種病症。

ccb.text: 耶稣走遍了各城各乡，在会堂里教导人，传讲天国的福音，医治各样的疾病。

csbs.text: 耶稣走遍各个城镇乡村，在他们的会堂里教导人，传天国的福音，并且使各样的疾病和各样的症状痊愈。
